mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pay_disbursement_order (created_at, updated_at, biz_order_no, channel_code, channel_serial_no, amount, payee_id, payee_name, payee_account, payee_bank_code, status, fail_reason, retry_count) VALUES (#{createdAt, typeHandler=com.winder.common.mybatis.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.winder.common.mybatis.InstantTypeHandler}, #{bizOrderNo}, #{channelCode}, #{channelSerialNo}, #{amount}, #{payeeId}, #{payeeName}, #{payeeAccount}, #{payeeBankCode}, #{status}, #{failReason}, #{retryCount})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM pay_disbursement_order WHERE biz_order_no = #{bizOrderNo}
